title: Foo Bar Analytics API Concurrency
description: Fix an analytics HTTP API that fails or returns inconsistent results under concurrent requests. The API uses a single shared ClickHouse connection that is not thread-safe.

tasks.description: Make the analytics API handle concurrent requests correctly without connection exhaustion or race conditions.

infrastructure.description: ClickHouse seeded with analytics data. A broken API on port 3000 uses a single shared connection and fails under concurrent load.
